content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative self-feedback loop for output refinement can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent problem-solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to break the local optimization trap that plagues current self-refinement frameworks. This creates a hybrid refinement system that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of needing no additional training or supervision while resolving its biggest limitation of being stuck in biased output patterns.
